title: Document Pipeline Specification

user_stories.title: Ingest Documents
user_stories.description: As a System Agent, I want to ingest documents so that they are chunked, embedded, and mapped in the knowledge graph simultaneously.
acceptance_criteria: Document is stored in Document DB
Document is chunked and embedded in Vector DB
Document is mapped to entities in Knowledge Graph

user_stories.title: Update Documents
user_stories.description: As a System Agent, I want to update documents so that changes cascade across the document store, vector store, and knowledge graph without inconsistencies.
acceptance_criteria: Metadata changes update across all storage layers

user_stories.title: Delete Documents
user_stories.description: As an Administrator, I want to perform soft/hard deletions so that stale or retracted information is properly expunged from all storage layers.
acceptance_criteria: Soft delete marks document as deleted but retains data
Hard delete permanently removes document from all layers

non_functional_requirements: Atomic Operations: Ingestion/Update failures must result in zero orphaned records
Zero Drift: Synchronization status must match actual state
Database Agnosticism: Works consistently across SQLite, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
